questionHtml:
The road from city X to city Y is 1000 km long. The displacement is 800 km from X to Y.

What is the distance travelled from Y to X and the displacement from Y to X?

meta.title: The road from city X to city Y is 1000 km long. The displacement is 800 km from X to Y. What is the distance travelled from Y to X and the displacement from Y to X?
